CVE-2021-1052.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux, all versions, co ...
CVE-2021-1052.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux, all versions, contains a vulnerability in the kernel mode layer (nvlddmkm.sys) handler for DxgkDdiEscape or IOCTL in which user-mode clients can access legacy privileged APIs, which may lead to denial of service, escalation of privileges, and information disclosure.

CVE-2021-1053.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux, all versions, co ...
CVE-2021-1053.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux, all versions, contains a vulnerability in the kernel mode layer (nvlddmkm.sys) handler for DxgkDdiEscape or IOCTL in which improper validation of a user pointer may lead to denial of service.

CVE-2021-1056.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Linux, all versions, contains a vul ...
CVE-2021-1056.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Linux, all versions, contains a vulnerability in the kernel mode layer (nvidia.ko) in which it does not completely honor operating system file system permissions to provide GPU device-level isolation, which may lead to denial of service or information disclosure.
